hooks.description: [LEGACY Phase 1] Soft cleanup checklist after gh pr merge / git merge: worktree removal, ops packet lifecycle (delete-by-default), context compact, agent-replay pruning
[Phase 2 new] After successful `gh pr create` or `gh pr ready`, emit additionalContext to arm Monitor + MONITOR_ARM_REQUIRED sentinel (ATTACK 9)
[LEGACY Phase 1] Block edits to architecture/** without ARCH_PLAN_EVIDENCE env (round2_verdict.md §4.1 #5)
[LEGACY Phase 1] Gate 1: refuse writes to blocking-class capability paths without ARCH_PLAN_EVIDENCE (ULTIMATE_DESIGN §5 Gate 1; sunset 2026-08-04)
[Phase 2 new] Block edits to .claude/settings.json or .claude/hooks/** without operator-signed sentinel (ATTACK 2 / OD-HOOK-2)
[LEGACY Phase 1] Run invariant pytest baseline before any `git commit` and block on regressions vs LIVE baseline 656/46/0 (round2_verdict.md §4.1 #5)
[LEGACY Phase 1] Run gitleaks against staged content before any `git commit`; honors .gitleaks.toml allowlist + SECURITY-FALSE-POSITIVES.md
[LEGACY Phase 1] Advise conflict-first handling for git merge/pull/cherry-pick/rebase/am on protected branches
[LEGACY Phase 1] Block git add -A/--all/. in main worktree (co-tenant absorption risk). Bypass: COTENANT_GUARD_BYPASS=1
[Phase 2 new] Block git checkout/switch when tracked modifications overlap target branch tree (silent revert prevention)
[Phase 2 new] Advisory: warn when gh pr create invoked with <2 commits or <80 LOC since base (paid auto-reviewer cost)
[Phase 2 new] Advisory: when phase-class subagent returns with tracked uncommitted changes, emit commit reminder
